title: Agent OS User Story Map
summary: User story map for an agent operating system, mapping activities and steps to four releases (R1 walking skeleton through R4 generation MVP).
notes: User story map (Activity/Step/release-tagged entries) describing product capabilities across releases R1-R4 from a user perspective -> PRD. Mentions implementation concepts (containers, GenServer, deterministic gate) but as capability outcomes, not contracts, so SPEC was a weaker competing signal. No Decision/Consequences structure rules out ADR. Required reading file agents/gsd-doc-classifier.md did not exist; classified using role instructions.
